message:
fix(server): skip RDB load when AOF is configured (match Redis behavior)

When both --rdb-path and --aof-path are specified, AOF takes precedence
for data loading since it contains the more complete history. RDB path
is still configured so SAVE/BGSAVE can write snapshots, but initial
data loading is deferred to the AOF replay path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
